title: InkClone Handwriting Profile
description: Formal schema for an InkClone handwriting profile. Describes a complete set of extracted glyphs, style metrics, and quality metadata for a single writing sample.

profile_id.description: Unique identifier for the profile. Must be a valid directory name.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the profile was created or last migrated.

source_method.description: How glyphs were extracted: template=from printed template, freeform=from free handwriting, hybrid=mix of both.

source_images.description: Relative paths to the source images used for glyph extraction.

character_coverage.description: Coverage statistics for each Unicode category.

lowercase_pct.description: Percentage of lowercase letters (a-z) covered. 100 = all 26.

uppercase_pct.description: Percentage of uppercase letters (A-Z) covered. 100 = all 26.

punctuation_pct.description: Percentage of standard punctuation covered (.,!?'-:;()). 100 = all 10.

total_characters.description: Total number of distinct characters with at least one glyph variant.

total_variants.description: Total number of glyph images across all characters.

per_character.description: Per-character glyph data. Keys are single characters or special names.

style_metrics.description: Aggregate style metrics measured from all glyphs.

avg_glyph_width.description: Mean glyph width in pixels (at 128px canonical height).

median_x_height.description: Median height of lowercase x-height glyphs in pixels.

baseline_offset.description: Mean vertical offset from baseline to ink bottom, in pixels. Positive = below.

slant_estimate_degrees.description: Estimated slant angle in degrees. Positive = right-leaning.

avg_stroke_width.description: Average stroke width in pixels at canonical glyph height.

ink_density.description: Mean ratio of ink (non-transparent) pixels to total bounding-box area across all glyphs. Range 0-1.

missing_characters.description: Characters with no glyph variants in this profile.

weak_characters.description: Characters present but with confidence < 0.5 (noisy or unreliable glyphs).

usable.description: Whether the profile meets minimum quality for rendering. True if total_characters >= 26 (full lowercase coverage).

character_entry.description: Glyph data for a single character.

variants.description: Relative paths to glyph PNG files for this character, ordered by variant index.

avg_width.description: Mean width in pixels across all variant images.

avg_height.description: Mean height in pixels across all variant images.

confidence.description: Estimated quality of the glyph extraction, 0-1. Values below 0.5 indicate noisy or unreliable glyphs.
